questionHtml:
To prevent leaks, a sealant is applied to the interior surface of the bird bath.

Find the surface area to be covered by the sealant, given that the bird bath has maximum volume.
markschemeHtml:
S= π×2500-28.8675…2×50         (A1)(ft)(M1)


Note: Award (A1) for their correct radius seen 40.8248…, 2500-28.8675…2.
Award (M1) for correctly substituted curved surface area formula for a cone.


S= 6410 cm2  6412.74…       (A1)(ft)(G2)


Note: Follow through from parts (a) and (d).


[3 marks]

meta.title: To prevent leaks, a sealant is applied to the interior surface of the bird bath. Find the surface area to be covered by the sealant, given that the bird bath has maximum volume.
